Frequently asked questions

Is the Fuel Price free on ContentVerse?

Yes. All India utility tools on ContentVerse are free to use with no sign-up required.

Is this an official government website?

No. ContentVerse is an independent platform. We use public datasets and open APIs. For official records, use government portals like Parivahan, GST, or your bank.
